evidence: "Under The Cherry Moon was just fun. Visually beautiful."
"The show is different than most crime series. It gets into the psychological minds of criminals & reveals the physical signs of their lies."
"I found NWA's rise to fame intriguing. They literally clawed their way from poverty to fame."
"The movie has come out with 2 different endings which drastically change the movie."
"It was painful to watch people lose their homes. So realistic & cruel."
"I laughed in spite of the movie's goofiness."
"I'll watch anything Andrew's in to appreciate his rare talent."
"Brie stripped of make-up & glamour, deserved the Oscar win."
"I've been an admirer of Andrew Garfield since I watched his mesmerizing performance in Boy A."
"Tim Roth is funny & charismatic. I enjoy the show because of him."
"The most disturbing dark 'scary' movie I ever watched. Horrific, cruel & claustrophobic in a low key way."
"I'm still grieving over Price's death 2 months later."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of drama, comedy, and psychological thrillers, often appreciating strong performances and emotional depth. They show a preference for high-quality production and are particularly loyal to specific actors like Andrew Garfield and Tim Roth. Their reviews indicate a sensitivity to emotional impact, often resonating with heartfelt and intense narratives.
